sources.note: Marriage to Eugene Speiden Burgess, Oct 26, 1898, Alexandria VA

notes: Great-grandmother on the Burgess/Recker line. Born in Alexandria, VA. Parents: Frederick William Recker (1842-1918) and Amelia M. Recker Schlichting (1857-1927). Siblings: William Recker (1877-1877, died in infancy), Frederick William Recker Jr. (1878-1946), Flora Recker (1881-), Ernest Henry Recker (1885-1958), Luttrell Kasper Recker (1887-1966), Eugene William Recker (1891-1969). Married Eugene Speiden Burgess on October 26, 1898 in Alexandria, VA. Four children: Brainard Recker (1899-1950), Alton Edwin (1904-1970), Flora Esther (1907-1996), Roy Wilson (1918-2006). Father died July 1918. Mother died May 6, 1927 in Alexandria. Husband Eugene died Dec 16, 1944. Widowed at age 69. Son Brainard died 1950. Brother Frederick died 1946. Brother Ernest died 1958. Died July 20, 1965 at age 90 in Washington DC. Buried in Suitland, MD.
